_comment_purpose:
Defaults for vocab keys referenced by shared-agent metadata and shared-agent bodies. Always passed first to shared-agent assemblers; MODE_VOCAB_OVERLAY (when set) is layered on top and wins on duplicate keys.

Vocab boundary (per setup.sh:assemble_claude_shared_agents): shared-agent vocab keys may differ across MODES but must not depend on VARIANT. Keys here must therefore have a sensible default that applies to every variant — typically the theory-first / no-mode default.
_comment_idea_prototyper_description: Default description for the shared idea-prototyper agent. Empirical-first mode overrides this via templates/agents/{variant}_modes/empirical_first/vocab.json so the agent describes itself as an empirical-feasibility check rather than a mathematical prototype.
IDEA_PROTOTYPER_DESCRIPTION: Quick mathematical prototype of a selected idea. Launched between idea selection and full theory development to verify tractability. Attempts the key derivation — if the main result doesn't go through, kills the idea before expensive theory investment.
